subject: School Closure – Monday
message: Please note that Sunrise Learning Center will be closed this Monday for a staff professional development day. We look forward to seeing all our families on Tuesday!

subject: Toddler B Weekly Update
message: What a wonderful week in Toddler B! We explored water and sand sensory play and started planting our garden seeds. Thank you for all your support.

subject: Infant A Sleep Schedule Reminder
message: A quick reminder that we follow each infant's individual nap schedule. Please update us if your child's schedule has changed at home so we can stay in sync.

subject: Preschool C Field Trip – Friday
message: Preschool C is visiting the nature center this Friday! Please pack a nut-free lunch and dress your child in comfortable closed-toe shoes. Permission slips are due by Thursday.

subject: Individual Note – Emma
message: Hi! Just wanted to share that Emma had a fantastic week — she's been very engaged during storytime and made some lovely artwork we'll be sending home soon.

subject: Allergy Reminder – Noah
message: This is a friendly reminder that Noah has a peanut allergy with an EpiPen on file. Please ensure snacks sent from home are peanut-free. Thank you!
